content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run a Quality / QA-QC discovery session. What product are we qualifying?
A luxury eye cream — gel-cream format, US and EU launch.
Both FDA (MoCRA) and EU Cosmetics Regulation 1223/2009. Also targeting Leaping Bunny.
24 months shelf life, 6-month PAO. Stability under ICH conditions.
Micro (USP 51/61), pH, viscosity, appearance, colour, odour, preservative efficacy.
CoA, MSDS, allergen declaration required. High-risk suppliers need audits.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
